message:
perf(session_index): move index snapshot writes to background thread

Spawn std::thread for enqueue_session_index_snapshot_update to perform
SQLite index writes in the background instead of blocking the caller.
Clone arguments into owned types for the move closure to ensure safe
transfer across thread boundary. Reduces latency on the hot path by
offloading I/O-bound index maintenance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
